subcodes.first_line: As regards his honor Áqá Rajab-'Alí, thou didst write that he hath ascended unto the realms above, and likewise thou didst inquire concerning his inheritance [3.5s]... ...As for the scribes and the differences between the manuscripts they prepared, this is what has shown forth from the horizon of elucidation
subcodes.first_line_orig: در بارهٴ جناب آقا رجبعلی مرقوم فرموده بودند که وفات کرده‌اند و همچنین از ترکهٴ او سؤال نموده بودند
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @law of Huququ'llah, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @law of inheritance
